dateline: Tampa Bay, Florida — BTS ARIRANG World Tour North America Leg Opens April 25; HYBE Chairman Travel Ban Row
heroHeadline: North America Leg One Week Away: BTS ARIRANG Tour Hits Tampa April 25 Amid HYBE Chairman Travel Ban Controversy
heroSubtitle: 4,694 days since debut: BTS prepares for the North American leg of the ARIRANG World Tour, opening April 25–28 at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL (4 sold-out nights, ~220,000 fans). HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk remains under a travel ban amid a Capital Markets Act probe; Korea Times reported on April 20 that a US Embassy letter sought a diplomatic exception citing BTS's US tour — HYBE denied requesting the intervention. ARIRANG holds a historic 3 consecutive Billboard 200 No. 1 weeks (K-pop first); Week 4 chart (dated April 25) pending.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Yonhap, setlist.fm, Japan Times, Starnews Korea, Korea Herald, and Recording Academy.
